title: iberis ruderalis
intro: Iberis ruderalis, also known as candytuft or rock candy, is a flowering plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae) that is native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which are attributed to its high content of isothiocyanates and other compounds. The health benefits of Iberis ruderalis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and support the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for colds, coughs, and sore throats. Iberis ruderalis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and provide a soothing, calming effect.
